Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Decree To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID TILLOTSON, TEL. NO. 957-1800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ANITA SCHINDLER'S Petition For Decree To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BY THE MOVING PARTY. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HK
